# Phase 6N: Automatic Telegram Delivery

Updated:

* /root/.hermes/scripts/hermes_router_execute.py
* /root/.hermes/skills/model-router/SKILL.md
* /root/.hermes/AGENTS.md

Changes:

* html_file now delivers to Telegram by default.
* Added --no-deliver-telegram override.
* Added deliver_file mode for existing generated files.
* Telegram is now the normal output center for personal-device usage.

No Hermes default model changed.
No private route activated.
